meaning: n.微(地)貌(指材料或地球等天体局部的表面特征)
examples: Objective to study the relationship between the microtopography of the gunshot damaged hair and the shooting distance.
Objective: to study the influence of attachment, proliferation, differentiation of osteoblasts on different titanium surface microtopography in vitro.
Some technical difficulties existed in the measurements are analyzed and solved. The high accuracy real time measurements of nanometer surface microtopography are carried.
